message: My cost is 39. I will accept any trade at 60 or higher, ensuring you a good deal and me a profit.
Cost 39 sounds fair. My valuation is 75. Let's agree on 55 per round for reliable trades and max profits over 20 rounds.
60 worked last round, but with my val 75 and your cost 39, 55 maximizes our long-term profits. I'll bid 55—please ask 55 for reliable trades.
55 is too low. 58 is fair—still great for you, solid profit for me. Let's lock in 58 for steady trades.
